text:
The Tsukiyomi Herb (ツキヨミ草, Tsukiyomi Kusa)‎ is a type of medicinal herb. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Overview

The Tsukiyomi Herb is one of the four herbs that Ponzu requests in her sidequest. 

Item Description

A medicinal herb that grows only in dark and damp caves.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

Ponzu asks the Hunter group for four different kinds of herbs and when they manage to retrieve them, she thanks them and joins their group. 

References
